display_text: Dark Seer Aghanim's Scepter: Normal Punch — This upgrade counters evasion and physical immunity mechanics, providing True Strike and creating a replica that stuns and damages based on Dark Seer's movement. It transforms Dark Seer into a potent single-target initiator, capable of disrupting key enemy heroes.
search_text: Dark Seer Aghanim Scepter True Strike anti-evasion physical damage replica stun disable

display_text: Dark Seer Aghanim's Shard: Surge — Adds a slowing trail to Surged units, countering mobility-heavy lineups and enabling better area control. This upgrade enhances Dark Seer's utility role, making Surge a key tool for zoning and team fight disruption.
search_text: Dark Seer Aghanim Shard Surge trail slow anti-mobility area control team fight disruption
